chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Admiralty Appeal No.01 of 2023 UPTC Trading LLC Versus MT Al-Maha & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection and reply of advocate at Flag “A” 2. For orders on CMA 2080/23 3. For hearing of main case. Dated: 08.04.2024 None present. -.-.- Ever since this appeal was filed appellant’s counsel has not appeared in the matter. On the first date i.e. 03.10.2023 urgent application was dismissed as the counsel was called absent followed by absence of the appellant’s counsel on 29.01.2024 and 04.03.2024. Today position is same and there is no intimation either. Instant appeal as such is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
